lessons.title: Greetings and gratitude
lessons.description: Learn the everyday words Swahili speakers use to welcome, thank, and comfort each other.

lessons.title: Freedom and solidarity
lessons.description: Explore the words that powered East Africa's independence movements and community spirit.

lessons.title: Spirit and identity
lessons.description: Discover how Swahili culture understands the self — through humanity, family, and inner character.
